parameters.query: =UPDATE receipts SET merchant = '{{ $json.merchant_name.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', owner_name = '{{ $json.merchant_name.replace(/'/g,"''") }}' WHERE id = {{ $json.receipt_id }} AND chat_id = {{ $json.chat_id }} RETURNING id, merchant, total_amount, currency, date, transaction_time, transaction_type, owner_name

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, message_id: $json.message_id, parse_mode: 'Markdown', text: $json.text, reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } }) }}

parameters.query: =SELECT id, merchant, total_amount, currency, date, transaction_time FROM receipts WHERE id = {{ $json.receipt_id }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.text, reply_markup: { force_reply: true, selective: true, input_field_placeholder: 'Chỉnh sửa rồi reply' } }) }}

parameters.query: =UPDATE receipts SET category = '{{ $json.category_en }}', category_vi = '{{ $json.category_vi }}', status = 'categorized' WHERE id = {{ $json.receipt_id }} RETURNING id, merchant, total_amount, currency, date, transaction_time, category_vi

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, message_id: $json.message_id, parse_mode: 'Markdown', text: $json.text, reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: [] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('Parse Callback').first().json.chat_id, text: '📝 Thêm ghi chú không?\nGửi tin nhắn hoặc /skip để bỏ qua.', reply_markup: { force_reply: true, selective: true, input_field_placeholder: 'VD: Ăn trưa với khách' } }) }}

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO receipts (merchant, total_amount, currency, date, transaction_time, description, ocr_text, chat_id, sender_id, sender_name, owner_name, transaction_type, status, confirmed) VALUES ({{ $json.merchant ? "'"+ $json.merchant.replace(/'/g,"''") +"'" : 'null' }}, {{ $json.total_amount }}, '{{ $json.currency }}', '{{ $json.date }}', {{ $json.time ? "'"+ $json.time +"'" : 'null' }}, {{ $json.description ? "'"+ $json.description.replace(/'/g,"''") +"'" : 'null' }}, '{{ $json.ocr_text.replace(/'/g,"''").replace(/\n/g,' ') }}', {{ $json.chat_id }}, {{ $json.sender_id }}, '{{ $json.sender_name.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', {{ $json.owner_name ? "'"+ $json.owner_name.replace(/'/g,"''") +"'" : 'null' }}, '{{ $json.transaction_type }}', 'draft', false) RETURNING id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, parse_mode: 'Markdown', text: $json.text, reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } }) }}

parameters.query: =SELECT id, status, merchant, total_amount, currency, date, transaction_time, category_vi, transaction_type FROM receipts WHERE chat_id = {{ $json.message.chat.id }} AND status IN ('draft','categorized') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

=UPDATE receipts SET merchant='{{ $json.merchant.replace(/'/g,"''") }}', total_amount={{ $json.total_amount }}, currency='{{ $json.currency }}', date='{{ $json.date }}', transaction_time={{ $json.time ? "'"+ $json.time +"'" : 'null' }} WHERE id={{ $json.draft_id }} RETURNING id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, parse_mode: 'Markdown', text: $json.text, reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: $json.keyboard } }) }}

parameters.query: =UPDATE receipts SET note = {{ $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message.text.toLowerCase() === '/skip' ? 'null' : "'" + $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message.text.replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" }}, status = 'confirmed', confirmed = true WHERE id = {{ $json.id }} RETURNING id, merchant, total_amount, currency, date, transaction_time, category_vi, note

SELECT TO_CHAR(date, 'MM/YYYY') as month, category_vi, ROUND(SUM(total_amount)::numeric, 0) as total, currency FROM receipts WHERE confirmed = true GROUP BY TO_CHAR(date, 'MM/YYYY'), category_vi, currency ORDER BY TO_CHAR(date, 'MM/YYYY') DESC, category_vi
